title: Collecting Duckweed Samples For Microbial Community Profiling

Rapid-Flow\u0026trade; Sterile Disposable Filter Units with CN Membrane, 1000mL, 0.2\u0026mu;m pore","mol_weight":0,"sku":"127-0020","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/127-0020","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":440,"name":"Thermo Fisher","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/440.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/440.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}},"2":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":348351,"guid":"424DB45E341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Sklar Sterile Disposable Scalpels","mol_weight":0,"sku":"06-3111","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Get 150 mL 0.2 micron filter unit. Lay sterilized miracloth on top of filter unit.
Collect 150-300 mL of water sample and pour through sterilized Miracloth into filter unit.
Filter water sample through 0.2 micron filter unit by turning vaccum on.
Cut 0.2 micron filter from unit using sterile scalpel.
Flash freeze and store at -80C until processing.
Collect 1-3 grams of fresh weight Duckweed from environment sample. (See “Separating Duckweed From Other Solids” to obtain pure Duckweed tissue from environment.)
Rinse tissue 3-5x’s with 30-40 mL rinse solution. Filter rinse solution through 0.2 micron filter each time.
Filter a total of 100-150 mL of rinse solution through 0.2 micron filter.
Cut filter using sterile scalpel, transfer to 5 mL centrifuge tube, flash freeze, and store for 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing.
Wash rinsed Duckweed tissue 2x’s with sterile water.
Transfer tissue to 5 mL centrifuge tube.
Flash freeze and store for 16S rRNA amplicon sequencing.
creator: Kenneth Acosta
